allow: Bash(psql "postgresql://ledger:ledger@localhost:5432/ledger" -c "set search_path to ledger; select code,name,parent_code,depth,type,sort_order,use_yn from category order by depth,sort_order limit 30;")
Bash(PGOPTIONS="--search_path=ledger" psql "postgresql://ledger:ledger@localhost:5432/ledger" -c "select email, display_name from household_member limit 5;")

Bash(PGOPTIONS="--search_path=ledger" psql "postgresql://ledger:ledger@localhost:5432/ledger" -c "select email, name from household_member where name like '%중환%' or email like '%test%' order by email;")

Bash(PGOPTIONS="--search_path=ledger" psql "postgresql://ledger:ledger@localhost:5432/ledger" -c "select count\(*\) filter \(where category_code='-'\) as dash, count\(*\) filter \(where category_code is null\) as isnull, count\(*\) filter \(where category_code=''\) as empty from transaction;")
Bash(PGOPTIONS="--search_path=ledger" psql "postgresql://ledger:ledger@localhost:5432/ledger" -c "select code,name from category where code='-';")
